summary: Build a professional academic web app "CDSCO India Drug Status 2026" for pharmacovigilance research: a searchable/filterable drug status database (approved/banned) with 500+ preloaded entries sourced from CDSCO lists/PDFs, auto-update checks, admin import/edit tools, CSV export, and live deployment with official reference links.
architectural_notes: Primary data sources include CDSCO PDFs (banned FDC lists) and CDSCO web pages/lists for approved new drugs (2024–2025).
Auto-update requires a scheduled weekly fetch/check of cdsco.gov.in sources and a stored "Last Updated" timestamp.
Support bulk ingestion pipelines for PDFs/CSV plus manual admin CRUD, with an export pipeline for full-database CSV downloads.
known_issues: Repeated build attempts failed to implement the full requested app; may require simplifying scope or staged implementation.

existing_features.title: Ensure the expanded canonical drug dataset (550+ entries across categories) is what populates the authoritative drug list shown in the Drug Database UI, matching the existing project goal of an expanded dataset.
Add/adjust the Drug Database UI header text to match the project requirement: display the header text “Complete CDSCO Drug Database | 500+ Drugs | Auto-Updated” prominently in the drug table module.

Apply a coherent, professional academic visual theme across the Drug Database module (cards, table header, badges, buttons, and banners) using a consistent neutral palette (avoid introducing blue/purple as primary brand colors unless already required) and consistent typography hierarchy.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create interactive searchable/filterable drug table with EXACT columns: Drug Name, Status (Approved/Banned), Uses/Indications, Reason/Justification, Notification Date, Source/Reference, Last Updated
Populate database immediately with 500+ drugs including ~444 banned FDCs from CDSCO banneddrugs.pdf and 100+ approved new drugs from CDSCO 2024–2025 lists (include provided sample rows)
Implement auto-update system: weekly check cdsco.gov.in for new approvals/bans, maintain Last Updated timestamp (show Feb 12, 2026), and provide "Check CDSCO Updates" button linking to official lists
Add CSV Export button to download complete database
Responsive professional UI for academic use with filters (Status, Year, Category), drug/ingredient search, sortable columns, and header text "Complete CDSCO Drug Database | 500+ Drugs | Auto-Updated"
Admin features: add/edit entries manually, upload CSV updates, and bulk import from CDSCO PDFs
Deploy live immediately with shareable URL and footer links to CDSCO approved new drugs page and banned drugs page

Implement automatic population of the backend authoritative drug database so that on first run (and after upgrade, if the store is empty) the canister contains 500+ drug entries without requiring a manual import.

Make the existing “Refresh & Verify” workflow reliable by ensuring backend methods required by the frontend hooks exist and return consistent data: getAllDrugs, getApprovedDrugs, getBannedDrugs, getCategorizedDrugs, refreshAndVerifyDrugTable, getLastDrugVerification, getDrugTableVerificationReport, and getDrugTableLastRefreshTimestamp.
